queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis investigates the impact of lacking a formal savings account on credit default probability and risk mitigation.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Research on determinants of default examines how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit risk and loan default rates.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Studies on credit risk drivers explore the relationship between maintaining minimal savings balances below 100 DM and reduced credit default probability.
